meaning: adj.冰的,冰状的,冰河的,冰河时代的,冰冷的
examples: Isotopic analysis of shells allowed geologists to measure another glacial effect.
In all these diverse regions, Agassiz saw signs of glacial erosion and sedimentation.
The glacial system is governed by two basic climatic variables: precipitation and temperature.
The changing climate will affect more than the mountains and the spectacular glacial views.
Golzernsee itself is a small alpine lake in a glacial trough, perfect for summer swims and picnics.
